NAME: Uganda Genome Resource
MANUAL_CITATION: Gurdasani, D., Carstensen, T., Fatumo, S., Chen, G., Franklin, C. S., Prado-Martinez, J., ... & Sandhu, M. S. (2019). Uganda genome resource enables insights into population history and genomic discovery in Africa. Cell, 179(4), 984-1002.
DESCRIPTION: Whole-genome and genotype resource from Ugandan cohorts (MRC/UVRI and LSHTM Uganda Research Unit), supporting African population history inference, imputation, and variant discovery.
